title: kohautia obbiadensis
intro: Kohautia obbiadensis is a plant species, specifically a type of flowering plant, that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. The medicinal properties of Kohautia obbiadensis lie in its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are often used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce the risk of infections. Kohautia obbiadensis can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
